## Chore / Maintenance

> **Target branch: `develop`** — All PRs must target `develop`, not `main`.

### Type

- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] CI / Workflow
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] TOC / metadata update
- [ ] Other

### Checklist

- [ ] Lua syntax validated (`luac -p`) (if Lua changes)
- [ ] `luacheck` passes with 0 warnings / 0 errors (if Lua changes)
- [ ] No functional regression
